name: ARROWHEAD PHARMACEUTICALS, INC.
business: Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals develops RNA interference (RNAi) therapeutics that silence disease-causing genes. The company has one approved product, REDEMPLO (plozasiran), for Familial Chylomicronemia Syndrome (FCS), and multiple clinical-stage candidates in various therapeutic areas. It also enters into license and collaboration agreements with biotech and pharmaceutical companies to develop and commercialize certain programs.

exposures.sentence: The Company develops medicines that treat intractable diseases by silencing the genes that cause them.

catalysts.event: FDA approval of REDEMPLO for FCS
catalysts.sentence: The FDA approved the Company's New Drug Application (NDA) for REDEMPLO (plozasiran) injection for Familial Chylomicronemia Syndrome (FCS), on November 18, 2025.

catalysts.event: Plan to file supplemental NDA for sHTG
catalysts.sentence: phase 3 studies (SHASTA-3, SHASTA-4 and SHASTA-5) for severe hypertriglyceridemia ("sHTG") have been fully enrolled and the Company plans to file a supplemental NDA for this indication in 2026

catalysts.event: Sarepta milestone payment triggered (first DM1 enrollment target)
catalysts.sentence: Triggered a $100.0 million milestone payment from Sarepta, which was achieved on July 27, 2025, when the Company reached the first of two prespecified enrollment targets and subsequent authorization to dose escalate in a Phase 1/2 clinical study of ARO-DM1

catalysts.event: Sarepta milestone payment earned (second DM1 milestone)
catalysts.sentence: On November 20, 2025, the Company earned a $200.0 million milestone payment from Sarepta.
Upon closing in October 2025, the Company received $200.0 million as an upfront payment

tamClaims.claim: Alzheimer's disease estimated to affect 32 million people worldwide
tamClaims.sentence: Alzheimer s disease is the most common cause of dementia and is estimated to affect 32 million people worldwide
